creator: iluxa@ex.ua
text:
Created attachment 181770
wmaker 0.95.8

Window Maker 0.95.8 was released 11 March 2017, please update.
I can build it and install, but only with this patches:
patch-configure
patch-doc__Makefile.in
patch-src__Makefile.in
patch-src__startup.c
patch-util__Makefile.in
patch-util__wmiv.c
others doesn't work, but it seems it works without them.
